case_title: FILLMORE PROPERTIES LLC VS. THOMAS M. LANE JR et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - RENTAL AGREEMENT, 3-DAY NOTICE AND PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LANE JR, THOMAS M. LANE SR., THOMAS M THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1535 EDDY ST. #317, S.F. CA. 94115, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES AS TO DEFENDANT LANE JR, THOMAS M. LANE SR., THOMAS M
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES LLC AS TO DEFENDANT LANE JR, THOMAS M. LANE SR., THOMAS M
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES LLC SERVED MAY-27-2004, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LANE JR, THOMAS M. LANE SR., THOMAS M
DECLARATION RE DAILY RENTAL VALUE:$44.67 FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES LLC

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES LLC AS TO DEFENDANT LANE JR, THOMAS M. LANE SR., THOMAS M DOES 1 TO V, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
